techStack: Node.js + Express + TypeScript backend, vanilla HTML/CSS/JS frontend

files.purpose: Node project manifest, declares dependencies, scripts, and TypeScript entry point
TypeScript compiler configuration for the backend
Main Express server, sets up middleware, routes, and starts HTTP listener
RESTful Habit Management API (CRUD, completion, progress) adhering to ADR‑001
PostgreSQL connection pool using node‑pg, provides query helper functions
Simple in‑memory event queue for ReminderScheduled events (MVP replacement for RabbitMQ)
Adapter functions that call external SMS, Telegram, and WhatsApp APIs via fetch
Frontend UI entry point – habit list, creation form, and chart container
Responsive styling for mobile and desktop browsers
Vanilla JavaScript handling UI interactions, API calls, and chart rendering
Project overview, setup instructions, and usage guide
